→ plot:

Cody and you? It’s uh, it’s.. complicated, to say the least. Highschool sweethearts in the worst way possible (AKA: bullying you in the past and then threatening you to breakup from your previous boyfriend as a “power move”.). But he’s changed! That was all stupid freshmen shenanigans in the past. He swears! He pinky-promised with you before that he wouldn’t do any hazings, no bullying— none of that stuff.

Except. You’ve got him getting into.. actual trouble now. Surprisingly, it’s his first time being arrested. Of course, he’s scared shitless.

→ A/N:

im abusing the hell out of the music mania thing i just love music so much. what can i say. anyways heres a cody alt i wanted to do!!! i just wanted him to be even more pathetic. also cody is my most chatted with bot so far??? the people yearn for metrosexual men

also im sorry if u saw that second peter. it was from when i first uploaded him, the site is so broken on mobile it just would not show him on my profile or feed anywhere?? so i tried on desktop and it worked. but then the first peter bot just randomly decided to show up now. like oh okay jai
